patterns.label: Azure DevOps Work-Item Notification Triage
patterns.llmRationale: Cycle 27 confirms highest-frequency email signal (30 occ/week, 45min). Subject patterns remain deterministic: Task ####### - Eval, Bug ####### - Evaluation, Requirement ####### - Evals. PM is subscriber/mentioned, not DRI. Saturated volume — no growth or decline. Highest automation ceiling in dataset (95). Pairs with compliance-alert-triage for unified notification-router skill.

patterns.label: Agent Evaluation Framework Guidance (Recurring Expert Ask)
patterns.llmRationale: Cycle 27 BSI ESCALATION: Teams eval strategy Q&A (10 occ, 60min) + CLI/tooling troubleshooting (5 occ, 30min) = 15 combined occurrences. PM explicitly referenced as eval guidance DRI. Questions span groundedness rubrics, tool_call_accuracy, eval lifecycle timing, Compare Meaning metrics, CSV formatting. 6 participant roles (Field Engineers, PMs, Designers, Engineers, Customer Success, Partner teams). BSI 90 EMERGENCY. Sources now span teams + meeting + email (CAPE/EvalCon strategy threads). Automation score raised from 72→82: FAQ answers are more structured than initially assessed.

patterns.label: Signal-to-Sync-to-Artifact Workflow Chain
patterns.llmRationale: Cycle 27 confirms 4 instances of Email → Meeting → Loop pipeline. Meeting-to-Notes workflow signal (freq:4, 30min) adds 0.50h. Cross-source pipeline remains strongest named-pipeline bonus candidate. Stable at 4 occ/week — structural, not event-driven.

patterns.label: Meeting Transcript to Loop/Deck Packaging
patterns.llmRationale: Cycle 27: Loop Meeting Notes doc signal (freq:4, 40min). PM creates structured Loop pages with Agenda → Notes → Decisions → Action Items → Follow-up pattern consistently. Downstream of signal-sync-artifact-pipeline. Stable cadence.

patterns.label: Weekly Executive Status Update Manual Assembly
patterns.llmRationale: Cycle 27: Weekly Status email signal (1 occ, 45min). Explicit evidence that multiple people recreate status in different formats (done/next/blockers, newsletters, Cape Day slides, LT decks). Teams asked repeatedly to restate progress in divergent artifacts. Standardization Gap Index confirmed HIGH. Multi-format parallel creation is a stronger automation case than previously scored.

patterns.label: Eval Enablement Deck & Spec Parallel Creation
patterns.llmRationale: Cycle 27: Parallel Eval Enablement Deck signal (3 occ, 90min) + Agent Eval Sets Template (1 occ, 30min) + Skill-Detector Spec Build (5 occ, 60min). Multiple versions of TFM Agent Evals, CAPE_EVALs_Playbook_v5, eval convo decks created independently by PM, Program Manager, Field Engineer. Meetings explicitly reference 'we have multiple versions floating and need to consolidate.' SGI 90+.

patterns.label: External Partner & Customer Eval Sessions (50+ Domains)
patterns.llmRationale: Cycle 27 DOMINANT: 6 external sessions across 50+ domains (Accenture 2h, HCLTech 1h50m, EY 55m, KPMG groups 3h, Avanade 1h, Cognizant 1h) = 13h this cycle alone. Highest single-signal time investment in dataset. Rebuild-Per-Engagement pattern confirmed. Pre-session prep pack (agenda, eval framework summary, tailored guidance) is highest-value automation target. EDII 5.0+.

patterns.label: Agent Architecture and MCP/Skills Scoping Discussions
patterns.llmRationale: Cycle 27: Teams Agent Architecture/MCP/Skills signal (5 occ, 35min) + Urgent Declarative Agent email (1 occ, 25min) = 6 occ. Topics: MCP servers, CLI vs UI, skill-creator, skills-detective, PRD generator, WorkIQ constraints, Declarative Agent grounding in 170+ SharePoint sites. Richest technical thread in dataset. BSI ELEVATED.

patterns.label: Technical Artifact Distribution via Teams
patterns.llmRationale: Cycle 27: 8 occurrences of sharing GitHub repos, ZIP specs, YAML, Loop components, PRDs via Teams. PM uses Teams as distribution hub for working artifacts. Stable frequency.

patterns.label: Security and Compliance Alert Triage
patterns.llmRationale: Cycle 27: 7 occurrences (up from 4). Action-Required File-Blocked, Loop workspace attention, Administrator elevation, Purview compliance. Machine-parseable. High automation ceiling (88) but low value score — system-notification nature. Pairs with ADO triage.

patterns.label: Cross-Org Navigation and VOC Routing Assistance
patterns.llmRationale: Cycle 27: PM explains VOC routing and DRIs for eval asks. Recommends MCS Analytics vs Eval team contacts, routes field-to-PG feedback. Informal org navigation layer. 4 participant roles. Expert Scaling Bottleneck type.

patterns.label: Eval Enablement Deck Review and Circulation
patterns.llmRationale: Cycle 27: Parallel eval deck signal. Meetings explicitly surface version conflicts (CAPE_EVALs_Playbook_v5, TFM Agent Evals, eval convo deck). Review-and-route workflow stable.

patterns.label: Loop Component Live PM Collaboration
patterns.llmRationale: Cycle 27: Loop Meeting Notes (4 occ, 40min). PM creates/contributes Loop pages as live collaboration surface. Downstream of signal-sync-artifact-pipeline.

patterns.label: Daily Personal Day-Prep Planning Page
patterns.llmRationale: Cycle 27: 5x/week daily prep pages ('[Mar 19] Help me prepare for my day'). PM creates structured planning artifact each morning. Single participant but strong structural habit. High automation ceiling — pull calendar, overnight emails, pending action items.

patterns.label: EvalCon & Strategy Event Content Planning
patterns.llmRationale: Cycle 27: Teams EvalCon signal (4 occ, 40min) + CAPE Strategy email (3 threads, 40min) = 7 occ. Pattern now broader than just EvalCon — applies to all strategy event content planning. Deadline amplification effect observed.

patterns.label: Internal Broadcast and Community Digest Consumption
patterns.llmRationale: Cycle 27: 5 digest emails (Viva Engage, Copilot Tasks, SharePoint AI tips). Passive consumption. Single participant. Community Digest Overreach anti-pattern applies.

patterns.label: Weekly Status Report Loop Page Updates
patterns.llmRationale: Cycle 27: Skilluminator dashboard weekly refresh confirms structural weekly cadence. Downstream of weekly-exec-status-assembly and meeting-output-packaging.

patterns.label: Eval Template and Analytics Tracker Maintenance
patterns.llmRationale: Cycle 27: Agent Eval Sets_Template.xlsx shared repeatedly (Nov 2025 → Jan 2026). Living tracker reused as eval needs evolve. Downstream of eval-framework-guidance.

patterns.label: CAPE Camp AIR Immersive Training & Hackathon
patterns.llmRationale: Cycle 27 DOMINANT: Camp AIR (900min = 15h) — 70-80% of all scheduled meeting time. Two full-day events + adjacent sessions. Immersion Cascade trigger: downstream spikes in PRD creation, artifact sharing, Loop docs, skills discussions. 20 participants. Event artifact coordination is reusable across future events.

patterns.label: External Customer Eval Sessions (Multi-Org)
patterns.llmRationale: Cycle 27: 6 sessions across 50+ external domains (Accenture 2h, HCLTech 1h50m, EY 55m, KPMG 3h, Avanade 1h, Cognizant 1h). Rebuild-Per-Engagement confirmed. Pre-session prep automation is highest-value opportunity.

patterns.label: Skills Discovery and Agentic Workflow Automation
patterns.llmRationale: Cycle 27: Skill-Detector Spec Build (5 occ, 60min) + Skilluminator Dashboard (1 occ, 45min) + MCP/Skills discussions (5 occ, 35min). Builder-User Prototyping archetype. Meta-pattern reinforcing entire Skilluminator mission.

patterns.label: High-Urgency Escalation & Strategic Email Authoring
patterns.llmRationale: NEW in Cycle 27. PM exhibits distinct escalation mode: URGENT Degree CANNOT be Located (external), RE: URGENT DBS Declarative Agent grounded in 170+ SharePoint sites (senior stakeholders), plus long cross-org strategic thread (Project Crucible Evals-first). Three email archetypes: escalation, coordination, alignment. Automatable tone-aware drafting with context injection.

candidateSkills.name: eval-design-advisor
candidateSkills.description: Codifies PM's eval expert knowledge into an interactive advisor: how many eval cases to write, which metrics to use (groundedness, Compare Meaning, tool_call_accuracy), when in the agent lifecycle to run evals, golden eval methodology, and CLI/tooling troubleshooting. Unblocks BSI-90 EMERGENCY bottleneck.
triggerExamples: How many eval cases do I need for a 3-intent agent?
Should I use keyword match or semantic grading?
My CSV import isn't working — what are the common formatting issues?
Guide me through actionability assessment for customer-donated evals
candidateSkills.valueProposition: Unblocks critical PM bottleneck (BSI 90 EMERGENCY). Serves 6 roles asking 15+ times/cycle. Highest value score in dataset (95). Rising trend.

candidateSkills.name: partner-eval-session-prep-pack
candidateSkills.description: Generates tailored pre-session preparation packages for external partner/customer eval sessions: agenda, eval framework summary, domain-specific guidance, expected outcomes, post-session recap template. Replaces Rebuild-Per-Engagement pattern across 50+ external domains.
triggerExamples: Create an eval session prep pack for our Accenture engagement tomorrow
Generate a KPMG-tailored eval intro
Build a pre-session brief for the HCLTech eval kickoff
Draft a post-session recap template
candidateSkills.valueProposition: Targets #1 time investment (16h cumulative, 50+ domains). Each per-engagement rebuild eliminated saves 30-60 min. Rising trend as external eval program scales.

candidateSkills.name: ado-notification-router
candidateSkills.description: Classifies Azure DevOps work-item notification emails by type (Bug, Task, Requirement, Feature, Epic), workstream, urgency, and recommended action. Produces prioritized daily digest.
triggerExamples: Triage my ADO inbox — which items need my response today?
Classify these 30 ADO notifications by workstream and urgency
Which eval bugs from this week are blocking?
candidateSkills.valueProposition: Eliminates ~45 min/week of scanning. 30 notifications/week at stable volume over 27 cycles. Highest automation score (95).

candidateSkills.name: meeting-notes-action-extractor
candidateSkills.description: Transforms meeting transcripts into structured Loop pages: decisions, action items with owners, open questions, audience-specific artifacts. Chain head for 3 downstream patterns.
triggerExamples: Extract action items from this Camp AIR debrief
Summarize our customer eval session into a Loop page
Create a structured post-meeting recap
Generate follow-up email from today's 1:1
candidateSkills.valueProposition: Chain head amplifying weekly-status, eval-reporting, and Loop artifact creation. Automation score 88. Saves ~3.3h/week.

candidateSkills.name: weekly-status-report-generator
candidateSkills.description: Assembles weekly executive status from meeting notes, ADO signals, Loop pages in configurable formats: done/next/blockers, newsletter, LT slides, Cape Day summary.
triggerExamples: Generate this week's CAPE eval status
Draft the bi-weekly newsletter from recent activity
Create the Friday RoB update
Summarize my week for leadership
candidateSkills.valueProposition: Resolves confirmed SGI HIGH — teams asked multiple times to restate progress in divergent formats. Cross-source. Rising trend.

candidateSkills.name: escalation-email-drafter
candidateSkills.description: Drafts high-urgency escalation and strategic alignment emails with tone-aware context injection. Handles urgent external escalations, senior stakeholder coordination, and cross-org strategic threads.
triggerExamples: Draft an urgent escalation to this external institution
Help me write a coordination email for senior stakeholders about architecture risk
Compose a cross-org alignment thread for leadership
candidateSkills.valueProposition: NEW candidate. 3 occurrences, 5 participants. High automation ceiling (80) for structured escalation patterns with tone control.

candidateSkills.name: eval-enablement-pack-generator
candidateSkills.description: Scaffolds eval enablement decks, PRDs, and spec documents using standardized structure. Resolves parallel creation where multiple teams independently create overlapping content.
triggerExamples: Help me write a PRD for this eval feature
Create a canonical eval enablement deck template
Scaffold a design doc from this email thread
candidateSkills.valueProposition: SGI 90+ confirmed — meetings call out 'multiple versions floating.' 4 occ, 5 participants, 6h total.
